SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.omf.records

Class OmfRecordFixupp

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.omf.OmfRecord
net.boricj.bft.omf.records.OmfRecordFixupp
All Implemented Interfaces:
StreamWritable
public class OmfRecordFixupp extends OmfRecord
FIXUPP - Fixup Record (32-bit) Contains relocation information for code and data.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    OmfRecordFixupp.DisplacementType
    Displacement type variants for FIXUPP entries.
    static class 
    OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry
    Fixup subrecord specifying a relocation entry.
    static enum 
    OmfRecordFixupp.FrameMethod
    Frame determination methods for fixups.
    static enum 
    OmfRecordFixupp.SpecificType
    Specific FIXUPP record type variants (16-bit vs 32-bit).
    static interface 
    OmfRecordFixupp.Subrecord
    Base interface for FIXUPP subrecords (threads and fixups).
    static enum 
    OmfRecordFixupp.TargetMethod
    Target determination methods for fixups.
    static class 
    OmfRecordFixupp.ThreadEntry
    Thread subrecord for establishing fixup context.

    • OmfRecordFixupp

      public OmfRecordFixupp(OmfFile file, ByteInputStream bis) throws IOException
      Parses a FIXUPP record from the input stream.
      Parameters:
      file - the parent OMF file
      bis - the input stream
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • OmfRecordFixupp

      public OmfRecordFixupp(OmfFile file, List<OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry> fixupEntries, Byte specificTypeValue)
      Creates a new FIXUPP record.
      Parameters:
      file - the parent OMF file
      fixupEntries - the list of fixup entries
      specificTypeValue - the specific type value (may be null to auto-detect)

    • OmfRecordFixupp

      public OmfRecordFixupp(OmfFile file, List<OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry> fixupEntries, OmfRecordFixupp.SpecificType specificType)
      Creates a new FIXUPP record with typed specific type.
      Parameters:
      file - the parent OMF file
      fixupEntries - the list of fixup entries
      specificType - the specific type (may be null to auto-detect)

      Parameters:
      file - the parent OMF file
      fixupEntries - the list of fixup entries

  • Method Details

    • getSpecificTypeValue

      public byte getSpecificTypeValue()
      Description copied from class: OmfRecord
      Get the specific record type value. For records with multiple variants (e.g., 16-bit vs 32-bit), this returns the specific variant value. By default, returns the standard type value.
      Overrides:
      getSpecificTypeValue in class OmfRecord
      Returns:
      the specific record type byte value

    • getFixupOffsets

      public List<Integer> getFixupOffsets()
      Returns the list of fixup offsets.
      Returns:
      the fixup offsets

    • getFixupEntries

      public List<OmfRecordFixupp.FixupEntry> getFixupEntries()
      Returns the list of fixup entries.
      Returns:
      the fixup entries

    • getThreadEntries

      public List<OmfRecordFixupp.ThreadEntry> getThreadEntries()
      Returns the list of thread entries.
      Returns:
      the thread entries

      Writes this record's data to the output stream.
